note: Engine line coverage ratchet. Gated buckets may not drop more than maxDropPct below `measured`. See docs/HARDENING-9-PLAN.md H-02.
targetNote: target.lib raised 60->85 (owner decision 2026-07-09): a business-grade quality bar for the lib/ business-logic core, NOT vanity 100%. The last ~10-15% of lib/ is external-service wiring (better-auth, S3, pg-boss, ioredis, Bun.SQL.subscribe, OTel SDK) and defensive catch-branches, better exercised by the integration/soak suites than by heavily-mocked unit tests. Routes are intentionally NOT unit-gated - they run out-of-process under the integration HTTP contract.
source: bun test src/tests/unit --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov (lines over loaded files)
